title: Senior Frontend Developer
description: TechNova Solutions is looking for a talented Senior Frontend Developer to join our growing Software Development team in San Francisco, CA. In this role, you will work closely with cross-functional teams to deliver high-quality results, contribute to strategic initiatives, and help shape the future of our products and services. benefits: Competitive salary and performance bonuses
Comprehensive health, dental, and vision insurance
Flexible working hours and remote-friendly culture

Annual learning and development budget
